bodyText: Hey, I'm Lindo! I like building cool stuff that works - web, mobile, whatever gets the job done.
I’ve worked with teams, led some, learned a ton, and taught a bit too.
So, let’s make the internet a little more awesome.
Technology should make everyday tasks simpler, not more complicated.
Explore what we can do for you.
Whether fact or fiction, stories offer a glimpse into someone’s mind.
